records.m_pText: Norende’s New Beginning
The Norende rebuilding effort$nis finally getting started!
I know nothing is going to get$ndone overnight…
But we’re taking that first step!$nI feel like the future finally$nlooks bright.
Still, building a whole village$nfrom scratch is a huge$nundertaking.
You’re taking a first step on a$nlooong, hard road, [PCM1].
She’s right. There’s no denying$nit will be tough.
What’s more, there’s no$nguarantee that success awaits$nyou beyond all that hardship.
It could be an uphill struggle$nthat doesn’t get you anywhere.
Come on, don’t talk like that.$nI’ve already got no confidence$nas it is…
All I have is…faith, I guess?$nOr the sense that I’ve got to$ndo this. It has to be me!
That is all you need, [PCM1].
Your quest to see Norende rise$nagain is no different than our$njourney to be rid of the chasm.
We’ve no assurance of success.$nWe may be walking a thorny path$nto no avail.
But we must press onward just$nthe same. We must believe in$nour actions!
Right!
Norende’s Draw
Progress on the village seems$nto be coming along nicely.
Yes, not too bad, I suppose.
I trust you have a draw planned$nout to bring in the crowds,$n[PCM1]?
A draw?
Sure. An attraction. A selling point.$nYou need people to come here, right?
Well, think of that the other$nway around. Norende needs to$nbe a place people want to go.
Ahh, good point! Hmm, a draw…$nSomeplace lots of people will$nwant to go…
Ooh! What about a special move shop?$nThat sounds exciting, right?$nAnybody?
Hmm, but is there really much$nconsumer demand for special moves?
Well, sure! They’re fun,$nand flashy, and…fun?
I bet warriors the world over$nwould flock there to shop!
Enough to fill a village?$nYou think this shop would have$nbroad enough appeal?
Uh…sure? Maybe?
I mean, special attacks!$nYou have to meet special$nconditions before using them!
And they’re extra powerful!
Hmm, you make a strong case.$nPerhaps I’ll plan to take my next$ndate to this shop of yours…
D-date!?$n(Just what kind of brawler is he$nplanning to go out with?)
Operation: Norende Rises
I wonder how long it will take$nuntil Norende is whole again.
Am I really up to the task of$nbuilding it all up again?
[PCM1]…
There’s no use in getting impatient.
The first step is to decide upon$nyour building priorities.
Knowing what needs finishing$nfirst is key to budgeting$nyour time wisely.
That was surprisingly helpful,$n[PCM2]!
Of course. It’s the same$nprinciple as dating multiple$nwomen at once.
Mrgrgr, I take it back!$nYou’re a pig, [PCM2].
Hmm, but what do I prioritize first?
One can never be too prepared$nwhen it comes to healing items.
Perhaps an item shop would be a$nprudent choice?
Don’t you mean armor?$nI feel like our defenses$nare a bit thin.
What better defense than$na good offense?$nI vote weapons instead.
Hmm, they all sound tempting.$nBetter keep thinking on what we$nneed the most!
Norende’s Population
Hmm, the village is coming$nalong well, but there still$naren’t enough people…
I hear you. It would be nice to$nup the pace a little.
Can’t you send out word to$neveryone you know and ask for$ntheir help?
…You three are everyone I know.
Oh, er… Right. Sorry.
I’m afraid the only people I know$nare those from the temple.
No, that… That makes sense.
Don’t look at me.$nI’m not conscripting women$ninto physical labor.
Ugh, fine! I guess I’ll have$nto ask my people, then!
I’ll just…oh. Right.$nI kind of went traitor, huh?
Well, then we’ll just have to go$nmeet some new people to enlist!
Yeah, but how are we going to—
Details! We’ll just head$nsomeplace with a lot of people$nand trust our luck!
Delegating Work in Norende
Is something the matter,$n[PCM1]?
No, just… I was just thinking.$nAbout Norende, I mean.
What’s the most efficient way to$nrebuild, do you think?
Most efficient?
Right. Once we recruit people to$nhelp, how do I go about$ndelegating work to them?
Hmm…
I haven’t got a head for$nnumbers.
Ah ha ha, me neither.
How about you, [PCM2]?
Not much, I’m afraid. I don’t even$nknow how many girlfriends I$nhave right now.
I’ve been beating my head against$na wall thinking of who to date$nin what order…
Perhaps you’re not hitting the$nwall hard enough. I’d be happy$nto help.
I suppose all we really need is$nsimple division.
There are three buildings which$neach take three days to build.
If I have three people to allot…
Then assigning one person per$nbuilding will take three days$nfor all of them.
Or, I put all three on one and$nbuild it in one day. That’s still$nthree days to build all three.
Wait, so there’s no difference?$nThen why bother worrying about it?
It isn’t the same, though. In the$nlatter case, you have use of the$nfirst building after one day.
And the second after the$nsecond. It’s a small difference,$nbut a difference still.
Assigning all three to each project$nearns the quickest gains,$nand may be most efficient.
Hey, you’re right!
A Gift from Norende
Some businesses in Norende say$nthey’ll send us gifts when built.
Ooh, presents!? Yaaay!
Ah, yes. Gifts are strategically$nimportant.
So, which businesses are they?$nWhat do we build?
The item shop, the combat item$nshop, and the compound shop.
I see!
And when will we get these$npresents?
I expect they’ll send them to us$nat regular intervals.
Hee, I can’t wait!$nWhat do you think we’ll get?
I imagine it’ll be merchandise$nthat each respective store$nstocks.
When giving a gift to a lady,$ncareful selection is key.
My personal advice is to choose$nan article she’ll wear every day.
That way, she’ll be forced to$nthink of you around the clock.
…Hmm?
Where’d everyone go?
Norende’s Special Moves
Hey, [PCM1]. Can you tell me$na little more about Norende’s$nspecial move shop?
Huh? Oh, sure.
So, there’s a base special move$nfor each different weapon type.
Ohh, it’s by weapon type?
Right. So you might want to try$nout a bunch of different weapons$nand see what works.
And you can shout whatever line$nyou want while performing them.
He he, I’ll have to think of$nsomething really amazing.
“This one blow will be your$nlast!” is an old favorite of mine.
Yes, that’s quite imposing!
Yeah, but then what if they survive it?$nDon’t you look like an idiot?
Hmm, then what about, “This will$nprobably defeat you, maybe!”
Hmm, that’s not really better.$nIn that it’s worse.
Perhaps just, “Gosh, it would be$ngreat if this defeats you!”
Not much of a battle cry, is it?
“Prepare for mild to severe$ndiscomfort!” maybe?
Ha ha ha, these are all$nterrible…
Norende’s Special Move Parts
There are places in Norende$nthat trade in special move parts.
Ooh, right! I’ve heard of those!
You can use those parts to$ncustomize your special moves.
And what’s more, the parts$naren’t consumed in the process,$nso you can keep reusing them.
Then what are we waiting for?$nLet’s get started right now!
It seems there are rare attacks,$neven among special moves.
Oh, really? That’s news to me.
What sort of thing do you mean,$n[PCM1]?
I mean staff and rod attacks!
They take different parts than$nall the others, so be sure to$ntry them out!
Norende Nears Completion
It seems the restoration of the$nvillage is nearly done.
It’s thanks to your hard work,$n[PCM1]!
Thanks, [PCF1].
At first, you didn’t even have the$nfoggiest idea of where to begin.
[PCM1] did not merely stumble on$nblindly toward his goal of$nrebuilding Norende.
He chose how to grow the village,$nhow to breathe life back into it.
Norende’s success is thanks to$nthat clarity of vision.
Absolutely. It’s super important$nto have a firm goal to strive for.
I always wanted to get stronger,$nbut no amount of good intentions$ngot me anywhere.
Then I put a note on my mirror$nthat said, “Do 100 pushups!” and$nevery time I saw it, I did.
[PCF2], that’s amazing!
And you’ve certainly grown$nstronger for it.
I have the bruises to prove it.$nReally, please, stop working$nout…
Er, ha ha…ha… Whoops.
Still, Norende’s finally come this far!$nI couldn’t have done it$nwithout you all.
Then let’s make sure we work$njust as hard until it’s done!
Right!
Norende Restored
The village! Norende!$nIt’s finally happened…
The restoration effort is complete.
Congratulations, [PCM1]!
Makes all that hard work$nworthwhile, eh?
Thank you all…$nReally, thank you.
Ah ha ha, look at that…$nI’m actually getting a little misty.$n*sniff*
Little wonder. This has been$n[PCM1]’s personal cause$nfor so long.
A long, slow effort to build up$nbrick by brick what the Great$nChasm stole in an instant.
You began the process alone,$nfrom absolutely nothing.$nTruly impressive work.
I wasn’t alone. Not really.$nSo many people came together$nto help bring Norende back.
If not for them, I’d have given up$nin those times when it all felt$nimpossibly big.
[PCM1]…
I wasn’t sure if people would$neven come to live here.
Whether any of this actually$nmeant something…
All those times I nearly gave$nthe village up for lost.
Everything I could do felt tiny.$nJust a tiny little step along an$nendless path…
Not so endless now, is it?
One step in front of the next,$nyou’ve seen it through!
I’m so… *sniffle*$nI’m just so proud of yoooooou!$n*hooonk*
Thanks…
Thank you all so much!
